name: HRC_TXN_ERROR
description: HRC_TXN_ERROR table is used to store the Warnings/Errors of a transaction that got in transaction framework code.

columns.Name: ERROR_ID
columns.Comments: Primary Key to the current table.

columns.Name: TRANSACTION_ID
columns.Comments: Foreign Key to HRC_TXN_HEADER table.

columns.Name: FAULT_CODE
columns.Comments: Category of the Warnings/Errors

columns.Name: TASK_ID
columns.Comments: Errors/Warnings  got with a TaskId of the Notification

columns.Name: ECID
columns.Comments: Errors/Warnings  got with a Ecid of the Composite

columns.Name: COMPOSITE_INSTANCE_ID
columns.Comments: Errors/Warnings  got with a Composite instance Id of the Composite

columns.Name: COMPOSITE
columns.Comments: Errors/Warnings  got with a Composite instance Id of the Composite

columns.Name: COMPOSITE_VERSION
columns.Comments: Errors/Warnings  got with a Composite version of the Composite

columns.Name: COMPONENT
columns.Comments: functional component of the Error/Warning

columns.Name: ERROR_SOURCE
columns.Comments: The source of the Error or Warning

columns.Name: FAULTED_OPERATION
columns.Comments: The action from which the Error/Warning occurred

columns.Name: ERROR_DETAILS
columns.Comments: More details of the Error/Warning

columns.Name: FAULT_DATE
columns.Comments: The date on which the Fault has occured.

columns.Name: IS_RECOVERABLE
columns.Comments: Flag to indicate whether the Error/Warning is recoverable or not

columns.Name: STATUS
columns.Comments: The Status of the Error or Warning

columns.Name: ENTERPRISE_ID
columns.Comments:
Identify the ENTERPRISE  to which the process belongs.  
Foreign key to PER_ENTERPRISES.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER
columns.Comments: Used to implement optimistic locking. This number is incremented every time that the row is updated. The number is compared at the start and end of a transaction to detect whether another session has updated the row since it was queried.
